//1: Root workspace package — not published. Publishable packages live in packages/* (assistant, api, core, review, tools).
name: gaunt-sloth-workspace
author: Andrew Kondratev

scripts.build: npm run build -w @gaunt-sloth/core && npm run build -w @gaunt-sloth/tools && npm run build -w @gaunt-sloth/api && npm run build -w @gaunt-sloth/review && npm run build -w gaunt-sloth-assistant
scripts.it-verbose: npm run build && GSLOTH_IT_VERBOSE=1 node it.js

//2: Root workspace package — not published, holds dev dependencies. Publishable packages live in packages/* (assistant, api, core, review, tools).
